zh.lifeSummary: 當Eudes II de Bourgogne於1118年7月11日出生在法國布格-福朗-可特艾o-達迪喬時，他的父親Hugues II duc de Bourgogne33歲，母親Mathilde de Mayenne25歲。他於大約1145年與Marie de Blois-Champagne在法國崔洛易-吉黑布盧瓦結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1162年10月4日在法國布格-福朗-可特艾o-達沙吉尼可拉-利斯-i奧享年44歲，埋葬在法國布格o-達沙吉尼可拉-利斯-i奧。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eudes II de Bourgogne于1118年7月11日出生在法国布格-福朗-可特艾o-達迪喬时，他的父亲Hugues II duc de Bourgogne33岁，母亲Mathilde de Mayenne25岁。他于大约1145年与Marie de Blois-Champagne在法国崔洛易-吉黑布盧瓦结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1162年10月4日在法国布格-福朗-可特艾o-達沙吉尼可拉-利斯-i奧享年44岁，埋葬在法国布格o-達沙吉尼可拉-利斯-i奧。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bourgogne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Bourgoin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alphee, Alyre, Andre, Armand, Aurore, Celina, Emile, Gilberte, Jacques, Laurent, Lucienne, Olivier.

variant of Bourgouin (and, in North America, an altered form of this), a habitational name for someone from Burgundy (Old French Bourgogne), a region of eastern France having Dijon as its center. The area was invaded by the Burgundii, an ancient Germanic tribe from whom it takes its name, in about AD 480. The duchy of Burgundy, created in 877 by Charles II, King of the Western Franks, was extremely powerful in the later Middle Ages, especially under Philip the Bold (1342–1404; duke from 1363). Compare Bourgoyne and Bourguignon .

nameMeanings.name: Eudes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Eade , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Eade
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, which originated as a nickname from a word denoting something round and lumpish. It is one of several given names that owe their origin to their use for a character in  Margaret Mitchell's  novel Gone with the Wind (  1936 ).

variants.name: Edes
meanings: This name is found as a variant or pet form of Edith in Yorkshire from the 15th century onwards. It is recorded as a baptismal name in the 16th century. In present-day use it probably refers to the biblical ‘Garden of Eden’, crew ῾eden ‘place of pleasure’. As a boy's name it may also represent a variant of Aidan or a transferred use of a surname, itself derived in the Middle Ages from a given name Edun or Edon. This is of Old English origin, from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + hūn ‘bear cub’.

variants.name: Edds
meanings: Pet form of any of several old German names beginning with Ed-. The Elder and Younger Eddas are also the names of two influential Old Icelandic books of Norse myths and poems.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Eudes II de Bourgogne was born on 11 July 1118, in Dijon, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, his father, Hugues II duc de Bourgogne, was 33 and his mother, Mathilde de Mayenne, was 25. He married Marie de Blois-Champagne about 1145, in Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, France. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died on 4 October 1162, in Saint-Nicolas-lès-Cîteaux, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, at the age of 44, and was buried in Saint-Nicolas-lès-Cîteaux, Côte-d'Or, Burgundy, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eudes II de Bourgogne est né le 11 juillet 1118, à Dijon, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, son père, Hugues II duc de Bourgogne, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Mathilde de Mayenne, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Marie de Blois-Champagne environ 1145, à Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 4 octobre 1162, à Saint-Nicolas-lès-Cîteaux, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, à l’âge de 44 ans, et a été enterré à Saint-Nicolas-lès-Cîteaux, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eudes II de Bourgogne am 11. Juli 1118 in Dijon, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugues II duc de Bourgogne 33 und seine Mutter Mathilde de Mayenne 25. Er hat um 1145 in Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, Frankreich Marie de Blois-Champagne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 4. Oktober 1162 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Saint-Nicolas-lès-Cîteaux, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Frankreich und wurde in Saint-Nicolas-lès-Cîteaux, Côte-d'Or, Burgund, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eudes II de Bourgogne è nato il il 11 luglio 1118 nel Dijon, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, il suo padre, Hugues II duc de Bourgogne, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Mathilde de Mayenne, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Marie de Blois-Champagne circa 1145, nel Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 4 ottobre 1162, nel Saint-Nicolas-lès-Cîteaux, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, all'età di 44 anni, e fu sepolto a Saint-Nicolas-lès-Cîteaux, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Eudes II de Bourgogneが1118年7月11日にフランスボウルゴグネ-フランチェ-コムトeクoテ-ド'オルディジョンで生まれた時，父Hugues II duc de Bourgogneは33歳，母Mathilde de Mayenneは25歳であった。約1145年にフランスセントアロイル-エト-チャーブロイスでMarie de Blois-Champagneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1162年10月4日にフランスボウルゴグネ-フランチェ-コムトeクoテ-ド'オルサイント-ニコラス-ルeス-クiテアウックスで44歳で死去し，フランスボウルゴグンクoテ-ド'オルサイント-ニコラス-ルeス-クiテアウックスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Eudes II de Bourgogne(이)가 1118년 7월 11일 프랑스 부르고그니-프랭체-코트e co테-드'어 디조에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugues II duc de Bourgogne(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Mathilde de Mayenne(은)는 25세였다. 그는 대략 1145년 프랑스 세트르 로이-트-처 블로이스에서 Marie de Blois-Champagne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1162년 10월 4일 프랑스 부르고그니-프랭체-코트e co테-드'어 세인트-니콜라스-e스-ci테오스에서 44세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 부르고그니 co테-드'어 세인트-니콜라스-e스-ci테오스에 묻혔다.

mn.11 JUL 1118–4 OCT 1162: 1118 оны Долоодугаар сарын 11–1162 оны Аравдугаар сарын 4

pt.11 JUL 1118–4 OCT 1162: 11 de julho de 1118–4 de outubro de 1162
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eudes II de Bourgogne nasceu em 11 de julho de 1118, em Dijon, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, França, seu pai, Hugues II duc de Bourgogne, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Mathilde de Mayenne, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Marie de Blois-Champagne aproximadamente 1145, em Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 4 de outubro de 1162, em Saint-Nicolas-lès-Cîteaux, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, França, com 44 anos, e foi sepultado em Saint-Nicolas-lès-Cîteaux, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eudes II de Bourgogne родился 11 июля 1118 г. в местности диджон, кoте-д'ор, бургогне-фрэнче-комтe, Франция, его отцу по имени Hugues II duc de Bourgogne было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Mathilde de Mayenne, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Marie de Blois-Champagne около 1145 г. в местности блоис, лоир-ет-чир, кентр, Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер 4 октября 1162 г. в местности сеинт-николас-лeс-кiтокс, кoте-д'ор, бургогне-фрэнче-комтe, Франция в возрасте 44 лет и был похоронен в местности сеинт-николас-лeс-кiтокс, кoте-д'ор, бургогн, Франция.

sm.from 1143 to 1162: mai le 1143 e o'o I le 1162

es.11 JUL 1118–4 OCT 1162: 11 de julio de 1118–4 de octubre de 1162
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Eudes II de Bourgogne nació el 11 de julio de 1118, en Dijon, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, su papá, Hugues II duc de Bourgogne, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Mathilde de Mayenne, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Marie de Blois-Champagne aproximadamente 1145, en Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Centre, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 4 de octubre de 1162, en Saint-Nicolas-lès-Cîteaux, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, a la edad de 44 años, y fue sepultado en Saint-Nicolas-lès-Cîteaux, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, Francia.
